creator: geo@sysdump.net
text:
(In reply to Ronald Klop from comment #23)
I Confirm it works on freshly installed 10-1-RELEASE (zfs gpt made with bsdinstall) with latest updates via freebsd-update.
that error still shows  but system loads successfully and I can boot the system.
my hardware is some old Acer Extensa with Core 2 Duo.
